name: ai-quality-engineering-playbook
description: V1 scaffold for an AI Quality Engineering Playbook in Node.js.

scripts.lint: node --check src/run.js src/run-tests.js src/preflight.js src/orchestrator.js src/scenario.js src/utils.js src/models.js src/connectors/jira.js src/connectors/gherkin.js src/connectors/github.js src/connectors/sonarqube.js src/generators/functional-tests.js src/generators/automation.js src/generators/change-impact.js src/generators/ui-utils.js src/generators/ui-automation.js src/generators/restapi-automation.js src/reporters/markdown.js playwright.config.js wdio.conf.js
